title: RedClaw
tagline: The self-learning AI agent that kills drudgery dead.
description: A self-learning AI coding agent with subagent bloodlines, DNA evolution, and dream synthesis. Provider-agnostic across 8+ LLM services with 6 interfaces including CLI, web, Telegram, and Godot. Achieves 41% on SWE-bench using free models.
features: 8+ LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, Groq, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, ZAI)
6 interfaces: CLI, Web, Telegram, Godot, Dashboard, AGI

title: GodotCode
tagline: AI coding assistant inside the Godot editor.
description: AI assistant editor plugin for Godot 4.6. Chat with Claude directly inside the Godot editor. Stream responses, inspect the scene tree, take screenshots, run shell commands, generate images, manage tasks, and more — all without leaving your workflow.
features: Live editor tools: scene tree, node properties, screenshots
Web tools and image generation (NVIDIA NIM Flux)

title: GodotOS
tagline: AI-native graphical shell built in Godot Engine.
description: A full desktop environment built inside Godot 4.6, controlled by an AI agent at its core. Features a floating window manager with minimize/maximize, app launcher overlay, built-in terminal, file explorer, task manager, and settings. Cross-platform Python bridge handles all system operations on both Linux and Windows.
features: EventRouter pub/sub system with string channels
App Launcher with JSON manifest discovery
Built-in Terminal, File Explorer, Task Manager, Settings
SnapshotSystem for state persistence and recovery

title: SlothFlix
tagline: Dockerized torrent streaming with Netflix-style UI.
description: Dockerized torrent streaming app with a Netflix-style web UI. VPN-routed, sequential torrent streaming with an embedded HTML5 video player. Search, stream, and watch — no manual downloads needed.

title: Living Diary
tagline: A gentle PWA companion with battles and AI-generated art.
description: A gentle, empathetic companion PWA with an interactive creature that evolves through 5 stages. Features automatic battles, dungeon crawling across 5 biomes with 45 zones, AI-generated art, crafting, skill trees, and seasonal events.
features: Fully automatic battle system with animations and SFX

title: HelioAi
description: A home inference stack running on an RTX 3060, controlled remotely via SSH. Two GPU-exclusive services share the hardware: text generation (llama.cpp) and image generation (ComfyUI with FLUX). Includes GPU swap scripts, deployment, and workflow JSONs.
features: GPU swap scripts for shared hardware
